# startSpeaking(_:)

**Instance Method**

An action method that starts speaking the selected text or all text if there’s no selection.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor func startSpeaking(_ sender: Any?)
```

## Parameters

- **sender**: The object that sent this message.

## Discussion

Speech continues asynchronously until the end of the text or until terminated by invoking the [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WebView-swift.class/stopSpeaking(_:)] method. This method behaves similar to the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/AppKit/NSTextView/startSpeaking(_:)] method in [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/AppKit/NSTextView].

## Controlling Speakable Text

- **stopSpeaking(_:)**: An action method that stops speaking that is in progress.
